candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; preferred over broader subtotal 'Total Revenue' because that includes other income.
Revenue-related subtotal, but less preferred because it includes 'Other income' in years where that is reported.

candidates.row_label: Income from associated companies and joint ventures
candidates.why: Not revenue; below operating line/non-operating associate income.
Financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income in the period
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet liability/deferred income, not sales revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not sales revenue.

variables.notes: Priority list: use 'Revenue' first; 'Total Revenue' is fallback if label changes across years.

candidates.why: Closest income-statement direct production cost line and the clear COGS analogue for this company.
Inventory asset, not period expense/COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost expense line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Classic overhead/personnel expense component.
Broad operating overhead bucket above EBIT; appropriate SG&A component.
Additional operating overhead bucket in earlier years; appears distinct from the lowercase row and should be included for coverage.
Explicit administrative expense component; strong SG&A match.
R&D disclosure exists, but it is supplemental and appears below EBIT, so not selected for SG&A per rule.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected overhead component rows above EBIT and excluded COGS, D&A, impairments, and totals/subtotals. Did not include supplemental R&D because it appears below EBIT.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D line available; labeled supplemental and appears below EBIT, but still the best dedicated R&D mapping.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists only as a supplemental disclosure below EBIT, so it is mapped to XRD but not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Best recurring finance cost total; preferable as a single line to avoid double counting with lease-interest subcomponent.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest subcomponent, but likely already included in 'Interest Expenses'.
Not finance cost.
Label appears but preview is empty; less preferred than populated 'Interest Expenses'.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate/sign-flipped presentation of lease interest; avoid double counting.
Equity/NCI, not interest expense.
Equity/NCI, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the single recurring finance-cost total to avoid double counting with lease-interest subcomponents.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity conversion option
candidates.why: Income statement fair value item, not book equity.
Not a balance-sheet equity line.
Equity excluding non-controlling interests, since 'Total equity' equals this amount plus NCI.
Component of equity, not total book equity.
Same owner-equity total as 'equity'; good fallback label.
Includes non-controlling interests and would double count with MIB.

variables.notes: OI:c. Chose owner equity excluding NCI. Avoided 'Total equity' because it includes non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance-sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; good fallback if label changes across years.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet NCI labels.
